name: Franxx-hakase
description: Creator of the FRANXX used to fight Klaxosaurs.

name: Guren
description: A kunoichi who appears in the second Naruto Shippūden filler arc. She is the female leader of Orochimaru's subordinates. She uses the unique Crystal Release brand of jutsu. As a child, Guren came from an unknown small village where she was shunned by others because she had unique powers. Later, Orochimaru appeared and destroyed the entire village single-handedly. He was intrigued by Guren's powers and offered for her to come with him. Guren chose to follow him because she envied his power. Quick

name: Harumi Kiyama
description: A scientist employed within Academy City. She has poor common sense, which is demonstrated as she often strips in front of others without thinking about it, a result of her years being a researcher.

name: Hinoe
description: Hinoe means third in rank, third sign of the Chinese calendar. A powerful youkai whose form is a human woman. She is madly in love with Natsume Reiko. Being knowledgeable, she often acts as Natsume Takashi's mentor. Hinoe enjoys teasing Natsume and Madara.

name: Hitoha Miyamizu
description: The head of the Miyamizu family and the maternal grandmother of Mitsuha and Yotsuha. Hitoha is a calm and composed woman with a strong love for her family, especially her granddaughters. However, she isn't particularly fond of her son-in-law since he rejected the Miyamizu shrine and its traditions to pursue a career in politics, calling him "that stupid son". (Source: Kimi no Na wa. Wiki)

name: Joy
description: Nurse Joy is a recurring character in every Pokemon series released. There are multiple Nurse Joys in every town, city and region. They all look the same, have the same voice and personalities. There have been numerous speculations as to why all the Joys look alike, though it seems they are all related in some way. name: Kamuri Sengoku
description: A childlike girl whose physical development greatly lags behind her actual age. She is an old friend of Eiko from elementary school, whom she adores, and becomes timid around others whenever Eiko is absent. Whenever she is addressed with a sensitive topic, she somehow manages to twitch her hair ribbon as an expression of her feelings. Her main hobbies are eating and sleeping (the latter of which is perhaps the primary reason for her belated development), although she is an extremely fast runner

name: Kaya
description: __Height:__ 169 cm (5'6") __Affiliations:__ Syrup Village Kaya is a rich girl who gets an inheritance after her parents died. Kaya becomes sickly, and her caretaker Klahadore often tends to her. (Klahadore was found three years earlier by her father, practically dead on their doorstep. Kaya's father took pity and offered the man a job.) Secretly, the town liar--Usopp--climbs a tree outside her window and tells her tall tales that make her laugh and feel better. name: Kunihiro Yamanbagiri
description: An uchigatana said to have been forged in imitation of the spiritual blade Yamanbagiri. He harbors a complex over the fact that he is not the original. Disliking being called beautiful, he deliberately dresses in a shabby manner. While his actual capabilities are more than sufficient, he is—in various ways—rather emotionally twisted.

name: Langris Vaude
nativeName: ランギルス・ヴォード
description: He is a nobleman of House Vaude and the vice-captain of Clover Kingdom's Golden Dawn squad of the Magic Knights. He is from Tota, a village within the Clover Kingdom.

name: Mamimi Tanaka
description: **Height:** 161 cm **Hometown:** Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan Mamimi is a girl who gives off a lazy and punkish vibe. She doesn't like to do things she finds troublesome and usually doesn't show enthusiasm for idol work. However she does care in her own way and will put in the effort she needs to. Mamimi is a member of the unit L'Antica and is in her third year of high school.
mediaTitles: The iDOLM@STER: Shiny Colors 2nd season - SHHis

name: Mamoru Uda
description: Uda is, like Shinichi, a human who had a Parasite merge with a part of his body other than his brain. In Uda's case, the Parasite lodged in the lower part of his head. Uda's Parasite originally does not have a name, but is later renamed Jaw (ジョー, Jō?). It is brash and crude-it even seems to have a sense of humour-and sometimes assumes control of Uda's mouth, distorting it into odd shapes and forcing Uda to say strange or inappropriate things. name: Meier Link
description: Meier Link is an extremely powerful "vampire knight" who is being hunted by both D and the Marcus Brothers for kidnapping Charlotte. Meier has the ability to change his long cape into steel with razor sharp edges, and his skill in using it matches D's skill with the sword.

name: Naoko Natsuki
description: Subaru's mother.

name: Naru Sekiya
description: **Height:** 150 cm Naru is a 14-year-old girl in her second year of middle school and has been best friends with Yaya since elementary school. She loves fairy tales and greatly idolizes the heroines in the stories. She sees herself as a girl who is average in every way possible, but desperately wishes to change herself to be more like the girls from the fairy tales she reads. She is timid by nature and is slightly jealous of some of her peers, including Yaya, Hana, and Tami, as she thinks of the

name: Natsumi Betsuki
description: Also known as "Becky," she is the Homeroom teacher of 2-A class. Because of her mood swings in her class, she has this trait of suddenly plunging the entire class into despair. Despite her young looks and demeanor, she is a true adult.

name: Neko Musume
description: A normally-quiet youkai girl, who transforms into a frightening cat monster with fangs and feline eyes when she is angry or hungry for fish. Predictably, she does not get along well with Nezumi Otoko. She seems to harbor a slight crush on Kitarou, who sees her only as a friend. She bears some resemblance to the bakeneko of Japanese folklore.
